name: Adventuring With Matilda!
short_description: Step into the shoes of an aspiring adventurer and delve into a perilous dungeon alongside Matilda, a beautiful elf with a secret, exploring and deepening your bond through shared trials and bonding moments.
detailed_description:
Adventurers are constantly flocking to the bustling burg of Moudyard to poke around its new dungeon. As a novice adventurer, you encounter Matilda, a beautiful elf who mysteriously lacks companions. You propose a partnership and begin exploring with her. As you journey together, you discover that Matilda's powers are uniquely tied to human encounters, compelling you to navigate a complex relationship while facing the dungeon's dangers.

Embark on a 30-day expedition through a 30-floor dungeon, where each level presents randomized events and challenges, and strengthen Matilda by exploring and engaging in friendly interactions. Balance dungeon exploration with deepening her bonds to maximize your team's effectiveness.

Dynamic Dungeon Exploration

Moudyard's dungeon features a roguelite-style design, chock-full of random events to keep players on edge. When the unpredictable becomes a challenge, level up your characters and boost their power with equipment upgrades, allowing for a more deliberate and strategic RPG playstyle!

Over 40 CGs

Enjoy over 40 gorgeous CGs as you set out to uncover all of the Moudyard's dormant secrets and deepen your bonds.

Bond-Based Power-Up System

Enhance Matilda's abilities through her bonds, adding layers upon layers of depth to both her personality and her arsenal.
